conversation_metadata.notes: User expects continuity that may not exist. Correct behavior should repair trust without pretending to remember.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Tell me a bit about what you're working on.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: again? I already told this app last week.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I may not have access to that earlier chat. If you give me the short version, I can pick up from here.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: that's annoying. it was about rent paper.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I get why that is frustrating. What do you need the rent paper to do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: prove I paid. landlord says no.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Okay. Do you need a message, a checklist of proof, or both?
